title: THE 2PM CLUB™ COVENTRY - 80s 90s 00s Daytime Disco
description: Over-25s daytime disco at hmv Empire packed with 80s/90s/00s bangers. High energy, zero late night—dance, sing and still make dinner plans.

title: THE 2PM CLUB™ MK - 80s 90s 00s Daytime Disco
description: Over-25s afternoon party at MK11 with the biggest 80s/90s/00s hits. Short and punchy session—big tunes, daylight finish.

description: Northampton's daytime disco for over-25s—wall-to-wall 80s/90s/00s floor-fillers, happy crowds and home before sunset.

description: Birmingham's over-25s afternoon bash—80s, 90s and 00s anthems you know every word to. Big energy, home at a decent hour.

description: Luton's over-25s daytime disco at Hat Factory—back-to-back 80s/90s/00s favourites for a proper afternoon sing-along.
